name: Flash
description: Flash weaponizes unstable lightning to keep constant pressure and punish hesitation.
passive: Tempo duelist. Every uninterrupted chain ramps his threat, but one mistake drops the momentum.
ultimateDescription: Build combos to deal more damage. Faster answers hit harder.

name: Shadow
description: Shadow destabilizes enemy focus, turning small errors into escalating pressure.
passive: Control disruptor. He warps rhythm and forces panic decisions without hard-locking play.
ultimateDescription: Disrupt your opponent. Their mistakes deal extra damage.

name: Guardian
description: Guardian anchors the fight and converts enemy aggression into controlled retaliation.
passive: Defensive tank. He shrugs off pressure, reflects chip damage, and punishes overcommitment.
ultimateDescription: Take less damage. When it ends, release it back.

name: Inferno
description: Inferno snowballs through accuracy, turning every correct answer into sustained burn pressure.
passive: Damage-over-time carry. He scales hardest when he can keep answers clean and continuous.
ultimateDescription: Stack burn damage that drains your opponent over time.

name: Architect
howItPlays: During ultimate, correct answers rapidly stack marks and fire unblockable precision cuts. Every 2-answer sequence detonates all marks in a massive collapse hit.
description: Architect scripts the battlefield like a solved proof, layering pressure until the opponent is forced into checkmate.
passive: Premium burst controller. He banks marks quickly, cashes out often, and converts consistency into repeated lethal spikes.
ultimateDescription: Build marks. Land a combo to unleash a powerful strike.

name: Titan
howItPlays: While active, all answer damage is unstoppable and heals Titan. Build a short chain, then fire an empowered Break Hit that ignores all mitigation.
description: Titan is pure inevitability. Once he starts rolling, defenses stop mattering and every exchange tilts harder in his favor.
passive: Premium bruiser carry. He converts correct answers into unavoidable damage, sustain, and armor-breaking finishers.
ultimateDescription: Hit harder, heal, and break through defenses.
